name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for tezzer

---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? What are you trying to do?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context

Note that tezzer intentionally avoids some features by design (for example,
server-side VT emulation). See the Architecture Decision Records under
`docs/adr/` before proposing changes in those areas.
